prompt: Create a dark gothic lolita fashion portrait of an adult woman in a decaying Victorian bedroom, styled like a haunted analog-signal editorial poster. The subject is seated on a pale tufted vanity stool at the right side of the frame, body turned slightly left, knees together, hands clasped under her chin, gazing off to the side with a mysterious cold, tipsy, vacant, vulnerable expression, as if she is being watched. She has long messy black hair, pale porcelain skin, soft dark makeup, black pointed nails, a black velvet vintage maid-style mini dress with white lace ruffled cuffs and white trim, a high lace collar, semi-transparent black thigh-high stockings with lace tops, and black Mary Jane platform heels. Include a small silver cross necklace and vintage rings. The room is dim, moody, and cluttered: faded blue-gray damask wallpaper, a teal antique vanity table with ornate gold legs and drawers, an oval mirror wrapped with pearl strands and lace ribbons, lit white candles, a small Virgin Mary statue, old perfume bottles and trinkets, a dark framed painting above the vanity, hanging lace strips from the ceiling, a side table with an old lamp, religious portrait art, and worn fabric textures. Use deep charcoal, dusty teal, tarnished gold, ivory lace, and low candlelit highlights. Add analog horror / corrupted broadcast graphic overlays: gritty scan lines, slight VHS noise, barcode fragments, waveform marks, and distressed white typography. Visible text should include exactly 6 text groups: large top-left title “ARC OF NOISE”; mid-left title “DARK HALO”; bottom-right large title “FEED ME STATIC”; small top-right phrase “THE SIGNAL BENDS. I LISTEN.”; small left technical block “FEED_0048// VISUAL UNKNOWN”; small bottom-left phrases including “NOISE IS NOT RANDOM. IT’S PRAYER.” and “EYES OPEN. TRUTH CORRUPTED. BEYOND THE NOISE.” Keep the typography partially degraded and integrated into the image, not clean UI text. Photorealistic fashion photography with cinematic chiaroscuro, shallow depth of field, high detail in lace and velvet, eerie intimate atmosphere, vertical 4:5 composition. Customize the subject as adult woman with long messy black hair and pale porcelain skin, outfit as black velvet vintage maid-style mini dress with white lace ruffled cuffs, thigh-high stockings, and black Mary Jane platform heels, room as decaying Victorian bedroom with teal antique vanity, candles, mirrors, crosses, lace, and religious art, main title as ARC OF NOISE, and poster phrase as FEED ME STATIC.
